description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house set within a spacious, landscaped yard. The house features a prominent dark gable roof, multiple white exterior walls, and expansive windows that provide ample natural light. The property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a driveway leading to a garage. Mature trees and manicured hedges line the perimeter, offering privacy and shade. The front facade is accentuated by a covered porch with columns and a well-maintained garden. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, creating a welcoming and upscale residential environment.
description: A spacious two-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard, surrounded by mature trees and a covered front porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and manicured front garden.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the dense tree line, garage, and partial backyard with patio seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and open lawn area.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the pool, patio, and extensive tree coverage along the property edge.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern suburban)
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and some grouped vertical panes
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent front door flanked by windows
